title: Validate data at the ingestion boundary
description: Run quality checks where data first lands, before it propagates, so bad data is caught at the source instead of in every downstream consumer.
body: Use when data enters a pipeline or warehouse. Do not defer validation to dashboards or downstream models — by then bad data has already corrupted derived tables and is far harder to trace. Actions: attach an expectation suite (schema, ranges, nulls, uniqueness, freshness) to the landing/staging step and gate promotion on it; quarantine failures rather than promoting them. Validation signals include a passing suite before any downstream read and a quarantine trail for rejects. Risk boundary: data validated late spreads through every consumer before detection; treat an unvalidated ingestion path as a defect and add a gate at the boundary.
